---
title: "Untitled"
output: html_document
date: "2026-02-11"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

## R Markdown

This is an R Markdown document. Markdown is a simple formatting syntax for authoring HTML, PDF, and MS Word documents. For more details on using R Markdown see <http://rmarkdown.rstudio.com>.

When you click the **Knit** button a document will be generated that includes both content as well as the output of any embedded R code chunks within the document. You can embed an R code chunk like this:

```{r cars}
#!/usr/bin/env Rscript

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(readr)
  library(dplyr)
  library(stringr)
  library(lubridate)
  library(tidyr)
})

# =========================
# Config
# =========================
main_path <- "/Users/caseyvanderlip/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-SharedLibraries-UCIrvine/Starklab - Documents/Casey/A4/shortertrials/data/A4_cognition_clean.csv"
cdr_path  <- "/Users/caseyvanderlip/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-SharedLibraries-UCIrvine/Starklab - Documents/Casey/A4/shortertrials/data/cdr.csv"
out_path  <- "/Users/caseyvanderlip/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-SharedLibraries-UCIrvine/Starklab - Documents/Casey/A4/shortertrials/data/A4_CogstateRealigned_withCDR.csv"

#main_path <- "~/Documents/Education/UCI - PhD/-Research (DNM)/Projects with Gillen/c3_efficienttrials/data/A4_cognition_clean.csv"
#cdr_path  <- "~/Documents/Education/UCI - PhD/-Research (DNM)/Projects with Gillen/c3_efficienttrials/data/cdr.csv"
#out_path  <- "~/Documents/Education/UCI - PhD/-Research (DNM)/Projects with Gillen/c3_efficienttrials/data/A4_CogstateRealigned_withCDR.csv"

anchor_visits <- c(1, 18, 33, 48, 57, 66)
anchor_window <- 5

# =========================
# Logging helpers
# =========================
ts <- function() format(Sys.time(), "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S")
log_section <- function(title) {
  cat("\n", strrep("=", 100), "\n", sep = "")
  cat("[", ts(), "] ", title, "\n", sep = "")
  cat(strrep("=", 100), "\n", sep = "")
}
log_kv <- function(k, v) cat(sprintf("[%s] %-38s %s\n", ts(), paste0(k, ":"), v))
log_n  <- function(k, v) log_kv(k, format(v, big.mark = ","))

peek_vals <- function(x, n = 8) {
  x <- x[!is.na(x)]
  if (length(x) == 0) return("<<none>>")
  paste(head(unique(x), n), collapse = " | ")
}

log_dups <- function(df, keys, name, top_n = 20) {
  d <- df %>%
    count(across(all_of(keys)), name = "n") %>%
    filter(n > 1) %>%
    arrange(desc(n))

  log_section(paste0("DUPLICATE CHECK: ", name))
  log_kv("Keys", paste(keys, collapse = ", "))
  log_n("Rows", nrow(df))
  log_n("Unique key combos", nrow(distinct(df, across(all_of(keys)))))
  log_n("Duplicate key combos", nrow(d))
  if (nrow(d) > 0) {
    cat("\nTop duplicate key combos:\n")
    print(head(d, top_n))
  } else {
    cat("No duplicate key combos detected.\n")
  }
  invisible(d)
}

# helper: pick nearest within window; tie -> smaller visit
pick_nearest <- function(vv, anchor, window) {
  vv <- vv[!is.na(vv)]
  vv_win <- vv[abs(vv - anchor) <= window]
  if (length(vv_win) == 0) return(NA_real_)
  d <- abs(vv_win - anchor)
  vv_win[order(d, vv_win)][1]
}

# =========================
# Load
# =========================
log_section("LOAD DATA")
log_kv("Reading main", main_path)
main <- readr::read_csv(main_path, show_col_types = FALSE)
log_kv("Reading cdr", cdr_path)
cdr  <- readr::read_csv(cdr_path, show_col_types = FALSE)

log_section("BASIC SHAPES")
log_n("Main rows", nrow(main)); log_n("Main cols", ncol(main))
log_n("CDR rows",  nrow(cdr));  log_n("CDR cols",  ncol(cdr))

# =========================
# Verify required columns
# =========================
log_section("VERIFY REQUIRED COLUMNS")
if (!("VISIT" %in% names(main))) stop("Main file missing VISIT column.")
if (!("BID" %in% names(main)))   stop("Main file missing BID column.")
if (!("BID" %in% names(cdr)))    stop("CDR file missing BID column.")

if (!("AVISIT" %in% names(cdr))) {
  if ("VISIT" %in% names(cdr)) {
    log_kv("AVISIT", "Not found; using VISIT as AVISIT")
    cdr <- cdr %>% mutate(AVISIT = VISIT)
  } else {
    stop("CDR file missing AVISIT (and no VISIT fallback found).")
  }
}
if (!("CDGLOBAL" %in% names(cdr))) stop("CDR file missing CDGLOBAL column.")

# =========================
# Keep BID as string
# =========================
log_section("STANDARDIZE BID (KEEP AS CHARACTER)")
log_kv("Main BID examples (before)", peek_vals(main$BID))
log_kv("CDR  BID examples (before)", peek_vals(cdr$BID))

main <- main %>% mutate(BID = str_trim(as.character(BID)))
cdr  <- cdr  %>% mutate(BID = str_trim(as.character(BID)))

log_kv("Main BID examples (after)", peek_vals(main$BID))
log_kv("CDR  BID examples (after)", peek_vals(cdr$BID))
log_n("Main BID missing/blank", sum(is.na(main$BID) | main$BID == ""))
log_n("CDR  BID missing/blank", sum(is.na(cdr$BID)  | cdr$BID == ""))

# =========================
# Coerce visits to numeric
# =========================
log_section("COERCE VISIT FIELDS TO NUMERIC (BID STAYS CHARACTER)")
main <- main %>% mutate(VISIT = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(VISIT)))
cdr  <- cdr  %>% mutate(AVISIT = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(AVISIT)))

log_n("Main VISIT missing after numeric", sum(is.na(main$VISIT)))
log_n("CDR  AVISIT missing after numeric", sum(is.na(cdr$AVISIT)))
if (sum(is.na(cdr$AVISIT)) > 0) {
  log_kv("Note", "CDR has non-numeric/blank AVISIT rows; they will be ignored for remap logic")
}

# =========================
# MAIN VISIT_remap
# - shift VISIT > 3 by +3
# - EXCEPT VISIT==33 stays 33 (no shift)
# - EXCEPT VISIT==57 stays 57 (no shift)
# =========================
log_section("CREATE MAIN VISIT_remap (NO SHIFT FOR VISIT==33 OR VISIT==57)")
main <- main %>%
  mutate(
    VISIT_remap = case_when(
  is.na(VISIT)      ~ NA_real_,
      VISIT %in% c(33, 57) ~ VISIT,     # keep as-is
      VISIT > 3            ~ VISIT + 3,
      TRUE                 ~ VISIT
    )
  )
log_n("Main VISIT_remap missing", sum(is.na(main$VISIT_remap)))

# =========================
# CDR AVISIT_remap (shift nearby to missing anchors within +/-5)
# =========================
log_section("CREATE CDR AVISIT_remap (SHIFT NEARBY TO MISSING ANCHORS)")
log_kv("Anchor visits", paste(anchor_visits, collapse = ", "))
log_kv("Window (+/- visits)", anchor_window)

cdr <- cdr %>% mutate(AVISIT_remap = AVISIT)

# Work only with valid numeric AVISIT for mapping
cdr_key <- cdr %>%
  filter(!is.na(AVISIT), BID != "") %>%
  select(BID, AVISIT) %>%
  distinct()

log_n("Distinct (BID, AVISIT) pairs", nrow(cdr_key))
log_n("Unique BID with any numeric AVISIT", nrow(distinct(cdr_key, BID)))

# Build per-BID list of visits
vis_list <- cdr_key %>%
  group_by(BID) %>%
  summarize(visits = list(sort(unique(AVISIT))), .groups = "drop")

# For each BID x anchor, determine if anchor missing; if missing pick nearest within window
candidates <- vis_list %>%
  tidyr::crossing(anchor = anchor_visits) %>%
  rowwise() %>%
  mutate(
    has_anchor = anchor %in% visits,
    best_avisit = if (has_anchor) NA_real_ else pick_nearest(visits, anchor, anchor_window),
    best_dist = if (is.na(best_avisit)) NA_real_ else abs(best_avisit - anchor)
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  filter(!has_anchor, !is.na(best_avisit)) %>%
  arrange(BID, anchor)

log_section("CDR REMAP CANDIDATES")
log_n("Total candidate remaps", nrow(candidates))
if (nrow(candidates) > 0) {
  cat("\nFirst 30 candidate remaps (BID, best_avisit -> anchor, dist):\n")
  print(head(candidates %>% select(BID, best_avisit, anchor, best_dist), 30))
}

# If multiple anchors pick the same best_avisit for a BID, keep closest (tie -> smaller anchor)
remap_table <- candidates %>%
  group_by(BID, best_avisit) %>%
  arrange(best_dist, anchor, .by_group = TRUE) %>%
  slice(1) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  transmute(BID, AVISIT = best_avisit, AVISIT_remap_new = anchor)

log_section("REMAPPING TABLE (APPLIED)")
log_n("Rows in remap table", nrow(remap_table))
if (nrow(remap_table) > 0) {
  cat("\nFirst 30 applied remaps (BID, AVISIT -> AVISIT_remap_new):\n")
  print(head(remap_table, 30))
}

# Apply remap to cdr rows
if (nrow(remap_table) > 0) {
  cdr <- cdr %>%
    left_join(remap_table, by = c("BID", "AVISIT")) %>%
    mutate(AVISIT_remap = if_else(!is.na(AVISIT_remap_new), AVISIT_remap_new, AVISIT_remap)) %>%
    select(-AVISIT_remap_new)
}

log_section("POST-REMAP DUP CHECK (CDR KEYSPACE)")
cdr_dups_remap <- log_dups(
  cdr %>% filter(!is.na(AVISIT_remap)),
  c("BID", "AVISIT_remap"),
  "CDR (BID, AVISIT_remap)"
)

# =========================
# Deduplicate CDR to 1 row per (BID, AVISIT_remap)
# =========================
log_section("DEDUPLICATE CDR TO ONE ROW PER (BID, AVISIT_remap)")

date_candidates <- intersect(
  names(cdr),
  c("EXAMDATE", "CDRDATE", "VISITDATE", "DATE", "CDADTC_DAYS_CONSENT", "CDADTC_DAYS_T0", "CDDY")
)
log_kv("Date candidates found", if (length(date_candidates) == 0) "NONE" else paste(date_candidates, collapse = ", "))

cdr_value_cols <- setdiff(
  names(cdr),
  c("SUBSTUDY","BID","VISCODE","DONE","NDREASON","CDSPVERS","CDPTSRCE","CDSPSRCE","BPID",
    "AVISIT","AVISIT_remap","EPOCH","CDEVENT","CDOLEEVENT")
)

cdr_dedup <- cdr %>%
  mutate(
    .nonmiss = rowSums(!is.na(across(any_of(cdr_value_cols)))),
    .row_id = row_number()
  )

if (length(date_candidates) > 0) {
  numeric_days <- date_candidates[date_candidates %in% c("CDADTC_DAYS_CONSENT", "CDADTC_DAYS_T0", "CDDY")]
  if (length(numeric_days) > 0) {
    order_col <- numeric_days[1]
    log_kv("Ordering duplicates by", paste0(order_col, " (largest kept), then non-missing"))
    cdr_dedup <- cdr_dedup %>%
      group_by(BID, AVISIT_remap) %>%
      arrange(desc(.data[[order_col]]), desc(.nonmiss), desc(.row_id), .by_group = TRUE) %>%
      slice(1) %>%
      ungroup()
  } else {
    order_col <- date_candidates[1]
    log_kv("Ordering duplicates by", paste0(order_col, " (latest date kept if parseable), then non-missing"))
    cdr_dedup <- cdr_dedup %>%
      mutate(.parsed_date = suppressWarnings(lubridate::ymd(.data[[order_col]]))) %>%
      group_by(BID, AVISIT_remap) %>%
      arrange(desc(.parsed_date), desc(.nonmiss), desc(.row_id), .by_group = TRUE) %>%
      slice(1) %>%
      ungroup() %>%
      select(-.parsed_date)
  }
} else {
  log_kv("Ordering duplicates by", "most non-missing CDR fields, then last row")
  cdr_dedup <- cdr_dedup %>%
    group_by(BID, AVISIT_remap) %>%
    arrange(desc(.nonmiss), desc(.row_id), .by_group = TRUE) %>%
    slice(1) %>%
    ungroup()
}

cdr_dedup <- cdr_dedup %>% select(-.nonmiss, -.row_id)

log_section("POST-DEDUP CHECK (CDR)")
log_n("CDR rows before", nrow(cdr))
log_n("CDR rows after ", nrow(cdr_dedup))
cdr_dups_after <- log_dups(
  cdr_dedup %>% filter(!is.na(AVISIT_remap)),
  c("BID","AVISIT_remap"),
  "CDR_DEDUP (BID, AVISIT_remap)"
)
if (nrow(cdr_dups_after) > 0) stop("CDR still has duplicate (BID, AVISIT_remap) after dedup. Inspect log.")

# =========================
# Join ON REMAPPED VISITS
# =========================
log_section("LEFT JOIN USING REMAPPED VISITS")
log_kv("Join keys", "main(BID, VISIT_remap) -> cdr(BID, AVISIT_remap)")

merged <- main %>%
  left_join(
    cdr_dedup,
    by = c("BID" = "BID", "VISIT_remap" = "AVISIT_remap"),
    suffix = c("", "_CDR")
  )

log_section("MERGE SANITY CHECKS")
log_n("Rows main", nrow(main))
log_n("Rows merged", nrow(merged))
if (nrow(merged) != nrow(main)) log_kv("WARNING", "Row count changed (should not happen for many-to-one join).")

candidate_match_cols <- intersect(names(merged), c("CDRSB", "CDSOB", "CDGLOBAL"))
match_col <- if (length(candidate_match_cols) > 0) candidate_match_cols[1] else NA_character_
log_kv("Match column", if (is.na(match_col)) "NONE FOUND (CDRSB/CDSOB/CDGLOBAL)" else match_col)
if (!is.na(match_col)) {
  log_n("Matched rows (non-missing)", sum(!is.na(merged[[match_col]])))
  log_n("Unmatched rows (missing)", sum(is.na(merged[[match_col]])))
}

log_section("KEY COVERAGE")
log_n("Unique keys in main (BID,VISIT_remap)", merged %>% distinct(BID, VISIT_remap) %>% nrow())
log_n("Unique keys in cdr  (BID,AVISIT_remap)", cdr_dedup %>% distinct(BID, AVISIT_remap) %>% nrow())

# =========================
# Write output
# =========================
log_section("WRITE OUTPUT")
log_kv("Writing CSV", out_path)
readr::write_csv(merged, out_path)
log_kv("Done", "✅ Saved merged file")

```

## Including Plots

You can also embed plots, for example:

```{r pressure, echo=FALSE}
# ============================================================
# Plot counts of non-missing C3 vs non-missing CDGLOBAL by visit
#   Plot 1: C3 counted by VISIT (main), CDGLOBAL counted by AVISIT_remap (cdr)
#   Plot 2: C3 counted by VISIT_remap (main), CDGLOBAL counted by AVISIT_remap (cdr)
# Filters: SUBSTUDY == "A4" (in cdr; and in main if SUBSTUDY exists)
# Graph tweaks: NO TITLE, x label = "Visit"
#
# Updates applied:
#  - MAIN VISIT_remap: VISIT>3 add 3 EXCEPT VISIT==33 stays 33, and VISIT==57 stays 57 (no shift)
#  - CDR AVISIT_remap: if subject missing CDR at anchor visits {1,18,33,48,66}
#    and has a CDR within +/-5 visits, remap nearest visit to the anchor.
# ============================================================

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(readr)
  library(dplyr)
  library(tidyr)
  library(ggplot2)
  library(stringr)
})

# -----------------------
# Paths (edit as needed)
# -----------------------
main_path <- "/Users/caseyvanderlip/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-SharedLibraries-UCIrvine/Starklab - Documents/Casey/A4/shortertrials/data/A4_cognition_clean.csv"
cdr_path  <- "/Users/caseyvanderlip/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-SharedLibraries-UCIrvine/Starklab - Documents/Casey/A4/shortertrials/data/cdr.csv"

out_png1  <- "/Users/caseyvanderlip/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-SharedLibraries-UCIrvine/Starklab - Documents/Casey/A4/shortertrials/data/counts_C3_vs_CDGLOBAL_by_VISIT_A4.png"
out_png2  <- "/Users/caseyvanderlip/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-SharedLibraries-UCIrvine/Starklab - Documents/Casey/A4/shortertrials/data/counts_C3remap_vs_CDGLOBAL_by_VISIT_A4.png"

# -----------------------
# Remap rules
# -----------------------
anchor_visits <- c(1, 18, 33, 48, 66)
anchor_window <- 5
no_shift_visits_main <- c(33, 57)  # <-- NEW: don't shift these in C3/main VISIT_remap

# -----------------------
# Logging helpers
# -----------------------
ts <- function() format(Sys.time(), "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S")
log_section <- function(title) {
  cat("\n", strrep("=", 90), "\n", sep = "")
  cat("[", ts(), "] ", title, "\n", sep = "")
  cat(strrep("=", 90), "\n", sep = "")
}
log_kv <- function(k, v) cat(sprintf("[%s] %-30s %s\n", ts(), paste0(k, ":"), v))
log_n  <- function(k, v) log_kv(k, format(v, big.mark = ","))

pick_nearest <- function(vv, anchor, window) {
  vv <- vv[!is.na(vv)]
  vv_win <- vv[abs(vv - anchor) <= window]
  if (length(vv_win) == 0) return(NA_real_)
  d <- abs(vv_win - anchor)
  vv_win[order(d, vv_win)][1] # tie -> smaller visit
}

# -----------------------
# Load
# -----------------------
log_section("LOAD")
log_kv("Reading main", main_path)
main <- read_csv(main_path, show_col_types = FALSE)

log_kv("Reading cdr", cdr_path)
cdr  <- read_csv(cdr_path, show_col_types = FALSE)

log_section("BASIC SHAPES (RAW)")
log_n("Main rows", nrow(main)); log_n("Main cols", ncol(main))
log_n("CDR rows",  nrow(cdr));  log_n("CDR cols",  ncol(cdr))

# -----------------------
# Filter to SUBSTUDY == A4 (where available)
# -----------------------
log_section("FILTER TO SUBSTUDY == A4")

if ("SUBSTUDY" %in% names(main)) {
  before <- nrow(main)
  main <- main %>% filter(SUBSTUDY == "A4")
  log_n("Main rows before SUBSTUDY filter", before)
  log_n("Main rows after  SUBSTUDY filter", nrow(main))
} else {
  log_kv("Main SUBSTUDY column", "Not present; skipping main SUBSTUDY filter")
}

if (!("SUBSTUDY" %in% names(cdr))) stop("CDR file missing SUBSTUDY column; cannot filter to A4.")
before <- nrow(cdr)
cdr <- cdr %>% filter(SUBSTUDY == "A4")
log_n("CDR rows before SUBSTUDY filter", before)
log_n("CDR rows after  SUBSTUDY filter", nrow(cdr))

# -----------------------
# Validate required columns
# -----------------------
log_section("VERIFY REQUIRED COLUMNS")
req_main <- c("BID", "VISIT", "C3")
missing_main <- setdiff(req_main, names(main))
if (length(missing_main) > 0) stop("Main missing columns: ", paste(missing_main, collapse = ", "))

if (!("AVISIT" %in% names(cdr))) {
  if ("VISIT" %in% names(cdr)) {
    log_kv("CDR AVISIT", "Not found; using VISIT as AVISIT")
    cdr <- cdr %>% mutate(AVISIT = VISIT)
  } else {
    stop("CDR missing AVISIT (and no VISIT fallback found).")
  }
}

req_cdr <- c("BID", "AVISIT", "CDGLOBAL")
missing_cdr <- setdiff(req_cdr, names(cdr))
if (length(missing_cdr) > 0) stop("CDR missing columns: ", paste(missing_cdr, collapse = ", "))

# -----------------------
# Standardize BID as character
# -----------------------
log_section("STANDARDIZE BID")
main <- main %>% mutate(BID = str_trim(as.character(BID)))
cdr  <- cdr  %>% mutate(BID = str_trim(as.character(BID)))

log_n("Main BID blank", sum(is.na(main$BID) | main$BID == ""))
log_n("CDR  BID blank", sum(is.na(cdr$BID)  | cdr$BID == ""))

# -----------------------
# Coerce visit variables to numeric
# -----------------------
log_section("COERCE VISIT FIELDS")
main <- main %>% mutate(VISIT = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(VISIT)))
cdr  <- cdr  %>% mutate(AVISIT = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(AVISIT)))

log_n("Main VISIT missing", sum(is.na(main$VISIT)))
log_n("CDR  AVISIT missing", sum(is.na(cdr$AVISIT)))
if (sum(is.na(cdr$AVISIT)) > 0) {
  log_kv("Note", "CDR has non-numeric/blank AVISIT rows; ignored for AVISIT_remap + counts")
}

# -----------------------
# MAIN: create VISIT_remap with exceptions for VISIT==33 and VISIT==57
# -----------------------
log_section("CREATE MAIN VISIT_remap (NO SHIFT FOR VISIT==33 OR VISIT==57)")
log_kv("Main no-shift visits", paste(no_shift_visits_main, collapse = ", "))

main <- main %>%
  mutate(
    VISIT_remap = case_when(
      is.na(VISIT) ~ NA_real_,
      VISIT %in% no_shift_visits_main ~ VISIT,
      VISIT > 3   ~ VISIT + 3,
      TRUE        ~ VISIT
    )
  )

log_n("Main VISIT_remap missing", sum(is.na(main$VISIT_remap)))

# -----------------------
# CDR: create AVISIT_remap using anchor-shift rule
# -----------------------
log_section("CREATE CDR AVISIT_remap (SHIFT NEARBY TO MISSING ANCHORS)")
log_kv("Anchor visits", paste(anchor_visits, collapse = ", "))
log_kv("Window (+/- visits)", anchor_window)

cdr <- cdr %>% mutate(AVISIT_remap = AVISIT)

cdr_key <- cdr %>%
  filter(!is.na(AVISIT), BID != "") %>%
  select(BID, AVISIT) %>%
  distinct()

vis_list <- cdr_key %>%
  group_by(BID) %>%
  summarize(visits = list(sort(unique(AVISIT))), .groups = "drop")

candidates <- vis_list %>%
  tidyr::crossing(anchor = anchor_visits) %>%
  rowwise() %>%
  mutate(
    has_anchor = anchor %in% visits,
    best_avisit = if (has_anchor) NA_real_ else pick_nearest(visits, anchor, anchor_window),
    best_dist = if (is.na(best_avisit)) NA_real_ else abs(best_avisit - anchor)
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  filter(!has_anchor, !is.na(best_avisit)) %>%
  arrange(BID, anchor)

log_n("Total candidate remaps", nrow(candidates))

remap_table <- candidates %>%
  group_by(BID, best_avisit) %>%
  arrange(best_dist, anchor, .by_group = TRUE) %>%
  slice(1) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  transmute(BID, AVISIT = best_avisit, AVISIT_remap_new = anchor)

log_n("Rows in remap table", nrow(remap_table))

if (nrow(remap_table) > 0) {
  cdr <- cdr %>%
    left_join(remap_table, by = c("BID", "AVISIT")) %>%
    mutate(AVISIT_remap = if_else(!is.na(AVISIT_remap_new), AVISIT_remap_new, AVISIT_remap)) %>%
    select(-AVISIT_remap_new)
}

log_n("CDR AVISIT_remap missing", sum(is.na(cdr$AVISIT_remap)))

# ============================================================
# Helper to build long count table for a plot
# ============================================================
build_counts <- function(main_visit_col = c("VISIT", "VISIT_remap")) {
  main_visit_col <- match.arg(main_visit_col)

  c3_counts <- main %>%
    filter(!is.na(.data[[main_visit_col]])) %>%
    summarize(
      n_rows = n(),
      n_nonmiss = sum(!is.na(C3)),
      n_missing = sum(is.na(C3))
    )

  log_section(paste0("C3 COMPLETENESS CHECK (grouping by ", main_visit_col, ")"))
  log_n("Main total rows", c3_counts$n_rows)
  log_n("C3 non-missing", c3_counts$n_nonmiss)
  log_n("C3 missing",     c3_counts$n_missing)

  c3_by_visit <- main %>%
    filter(!is.na(.data[[main_visit_col]])) %>%
    group_by(visit = .data[[main_visit_col]]) %>%
    summarize(count = sum(!is.na(C3)), .groups = "drop") %>%
    mutate(measure = "C3")

  cdg_check <- cdr %>%
    filter(!is.na(AVISIT_remap)) %>%
    summarize(
      n_rows = n(),
      n_nonmiss = sum(!is.na(CDGLOBAL)),
      n_missing = sum(is.na(CDGLOBAL))
    )

  log_section("CDGLOBAL COMPLETENESS CHECK (grouping by AVISIT_remap)")
  log_n("CDR total rows (non-missing AVISIT_remap)", cdg_check$n_rows)
  log_n("CDGLOBAL non-missing", cdg_check$n_nonmiss)
  log_n("CDGLOBAL missing",     cdg_check$n_missing)

  cdg_by_visit <- cdr %>%
    filter(!is.na(AVISIT_remap)) %>%
    group_by(visit = AVISIT_remap) %>%
    summarize(count = sum(!is.na(CDGLOBAL)), .groups = "drop") %>%
    mutate(measure = "CDGLOBAL")

  out <- bind_rows(c3_by_visit, cdg_by_visit) %>%
    mutate(visit = as.numeric(visit)) %>%
    complete(visit = sort(unique(visit)), measure, fill = list(count = 0)) %>%
    arrange(visit, measure)

  log_section(paste0("COUNTS TABLE READY (C3 by ", main_visit_col, " + CDGLOBAL by AVISIT_remap)"))
  log_n("Unique visits in output", length(unique(out$visit)))
  log_n("Rows in output (visit x measure)", nrow(out))

  out
}

# ============================================================
# Plot 1
# ============================================================
log_section("BUILD + PLOT 1: VISIT (C3) vs AVISIT_remap (CDGLOBAL)")
dat1 <- build_counts("VISIT")

p1 <- ggplot(dat1, aes(x = factor(visit), y = count, fill = measure)) +
  geom_col(position = position_dodge(width = 0.9), width = 0.85) +
  labs(title = NULL, x = "Visit", y = "Count (non-missing)", fill = "Measure") +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_blank(),
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, vjust = 0.5, hjust = 1)
  )

log_kv("Saving plot 1", out_png1)
ggsave(out_png1, p1, width = 14, height = 6, dpi = 300)

# ============================================================
# Plot 2
# ============================================================
log_section("BUILD + PLOT 2: VISIT_remap (C3) vs AVISIT_remap (CDGLOBAL)")
dat2 <- build_counts("VISIT_remap")

p2 <- ggplot(dat2, aes(x = factor(visit), y = count, fill = measure)) +
  geom_col(position = position_dodge(width = 0.9), width = 0.85) +
  labs(title = NULL, x = "Visit", y = "Count (non-missing)", fill = "Measure") +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_blank(),
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, vjust = 0.5, hjust = 1)
  )

log_kv("Saving plot 2", out_png2)
ggsave(out_png2, p2, width = 14, height = 6, dpi = 300)

log_section("DONE")
log_kv("Plot 1 saved", out_png1)
log_kv("Plot 2 saved", out_png2)
```

Note that the `echo = FALSE` parameter was added to the code chunk to prevent printing of the R code that generated the plot.
